creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 238103
"git diff" patch to update the port

- update 20211001 -> 20221114
Changes: https://metacpan.org/dist/Mozilla-CA/changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.18.4
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
